name: Bar Benders
description: Electric rebar bending machines for construction steel work. Heavy-duty bar bending equipment for reinforced concrete preparation.

machines.name: Toyo TBB-32 Heavy Duty Rebar Bending Machine
machines.shortDescription: Toyo TBB-32 heavy-duty electric rebar bender rated up to 32 mm diameter. Japanese precision for construction bar bending from 10-32 mm with adjustable angle control.
machines.description: Toyo TBB-32 heavy-duty electric rebar bender rated up to 32 mm diameter. Japanese precision for construction bar bending from 10-32 mm with adjustable angle control. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 32 mm capacity bends the heaviest column and beam rebar used in UAE high-rise construction
0-180° adjustable limit switch with auto-return for repetitive identical-angle production bending
2.2 kW 3-phase motor with foot pedal control leaves both hands free for bar handling
Hardened steel rollers with grease fittings — swap in 5 minutes when wear grooves develop
4 seconds per 90° bend means 15 bars bent per minute for high-volume slab preparation
Toyo Japanese engineering with parts and service support through regional distributors in Dubai

machines.name: Alba CAE-32 Electric Rebar Bender
machines.shortDescription: Alba CAE-32 electric rebar bender with 32 mm capacity and digital angle presets. Italian machine for precision stirrup and rebar bending in precast and in-situ concrete works.
machines.description: Alba CAE-32 electric rebar bender with 32 mm capacity and digital angle presets. Italian machine for precision stirrup and rebar bending in precast and in-situ concrete works. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Control: Digital angle display with memory presets

features: Digital angle presets store 10 bend angles — switch between stirrup, link, and column bar bends instantly
Programmable auto-return with angle tolerance of ±1° for precise reinforcement cage assembly
5 interchangeable mandrels cover the full 10-32 mm bar range without shims or adapters
Two-hand safety interlock requires both operator hands clear before the bending cycle starts
3.5-second cycle time with Italian-made Alba gearmotor designed for 100,000+ bend cycles
195 kg bench-mount with pre-drilled base plate for anchor bolt fixing to the shop floor

machines.name: Gocmaksan BD 36 Mechanical Bar Bending Machine
machines.shortDescription: Gocmaksan BD 36 mechanical bar bender rated 36 mm diameter. Turkish heavy-duty machine for large-scale construction bar bending with gear-driven rotating table.
machines.description: Gocmaksan BD 36 mechanical bar bender rated 36 mm diameter. Turkish heavy-duty machine for large-scale construction bar bending with gear-driven rotating table. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 36 mm capacity — bends the largest diameter rebar used in UAE bridge and infrastructure projects
Gear-driven rotating table with 350 mm diameter — handles double-bar bending for heavy column ties
3.0 kW motor through a reduction gearbox delivers 12,000 Nm of bending torque at the table
Mechanical gear drive with zero hydraulics — no hoses, no oil leaks, no pump maintenance
Auto-stop cam with mechanical trip — set the angle once and repeat thousands of identical bends
260 kg floor-mounted with 8-bolt anchor pattern for zero movement during heavy bar bending

machines.name: Makita WRC16 18V Cordless Rebar Bender
machines.shortDescription: Makita WRC16 18V cordless rebar bender rated 16 mm. Battery-powered portable bender for on-site stirrup adjustment, formwork corrections, and in-situ bar bending without power cables.
machines.description: Makita WRC16 18V cordless rebar bender rated 16 mm. Battery-powered portable bender for on-site stirrup adjustment, formwork corrections, and in-situ bar bending without power cables. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Safety: Trigger lock with auto-off jaw release

features: 6.8 kg cordless — one worker carries the bender to rebar in formwork, not the other way
Makita 18V LXT battery shared with drills and grinders across the site fleet
180 bends per 5.0 Ah charge — enough for a full day of stirrup and link adjustments
16 mm capacity handles wall and slab distribution bars without generator or electric cable runs
Auto-off jaw release opens the gripping mechanism when the trigger is released for safety
Ideal for in-situ corrections when the concrete pump is waiting — no setup, just bend and go
